# Flux Docs

> Technical documentation for DICOM Capacitor and DICOM Printer 2 by Flux Inc. — medical imaging routing, processing, and printing software for healthcare environments.

## DICOM Capacitor

DICOM Capacitor is a Windows/Linux/Docker service that receives DICOM images and worklist/QR queries via SCP, applies configurable filters (Lua scripting, tag mutation, routing, sorting, query proxying), and forwards to destination nodes.

- [Overview](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/): Product overview and feature summary
- [Installation](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/installation): Windows and Linux installation
- [Docker](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/docker): Docker deployment
- [Configuration](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/configuration): Configuration guide
- [Settings Reference](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/config): Full config.yml reference
- [Nodes](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/nodes): Configuring DICOM nodes (SCP, SCU, Worklist, QR)
- [Filters](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/filters/): Filter pipeline overview
- [Lua Filter](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/filters/lua): Lua scripting for storage and query proxying — contexts, entry config, error handling
- [Lua API Reference](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/filters/lua-api): Complete Lua global object and method reference
- [Lua Examples](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/filters/lua-examples): Lua scripting examples and cheat sheet
- [Mutate Filter](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/filters/mutate): Declarative tag mutation rules
- [Route Filter](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/filters/route): Declarative routing rules
- [Sort Filter](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/filters/sort): Image ordering
- [Filter Conditions](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/filters/conditions): Condition syntax shared across filters
- [Worklist Pre-Fetch](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/prefetch): Worklist caching and pre-fetch configuration
- [Web Dashboard](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/web-ui): Web UI usage and features
- [HTTP API](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/api): REST API reference
- [Command Line](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/command-line): CLI options and overrides
- [Cache](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/cache): Cache inspection and management
- [Logs](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/logs): Log access and interpretation
- [Starting and Stopping](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/starting-and-stopping): Service management
- [Upgrading](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/upgrading): Upgrade procedures
- [Uninstallation](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-capacitor/uninstallation): Removal

## DICOM Printer 2

DICOM Printer 2 is a Windows service that automates DICOM printing workflows — receiving print jobs, applying transformations, and routing output.

- [Overview](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/): Product overview
- [Architecture](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/architecture): Design and architecture
- [Installation](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/installation): Installation
- [Configuration](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/configuration): Configuration guide
- [Configuration Reference](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/config): Full config reference
- [Actions](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/actions/): Action pipeline overview
- [Query Action](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/actions/query): DICOM query actions
- [Store Action](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/actions/store): DICOM store actions
- [Print Action](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/actions/print): Print actions
- [SetTag Action](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/actions/settag): Tag manipulation
- [SetSequence Action](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/actions/setsequence): Sequence manipulation
- [Image Manipulation](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/actions/image-manipulation): Image processing actions
- [Workflow](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/workflow/): Workflow configuration
- [Placeholders](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/placeholders): Placeholder syntax
- [Drop Monitor](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/drop-monitor): Drop monitor configuration
- [Queue Dashboard](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/queue-dashboard): Queue monitoring
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/troubleshooting): Common issues and solutions
- [DICOM Conformance Statement](https://docs.fluxinc.co/dicom-printer-2/conformance): DICOM conformance details

## Optional

- [Full content](https://docs.fluxinc.co/llms-full.txt): All documentation pages concatenated for LLM consumption
